str_284D51BD: Darkness enveloped everything around. I couldn't see anything. I couldn't hear a sound.
str_3B03799B: Through the dark veil, I tried to inhale, but instead of air, my mouth filled with damp earth.
str_53974859: Nausea rose to my throat. Panic seized my mind.
str_51111768: With the last of my strength, I tried to move my arms and legs. Fluttering nervously, I felt the damp earth envelop my body.
str_A1689B4A: My hands reached up, and light broke through the earth.
str_13278471: An inhale, another, and another. I finally felt the air.
str_EDB40D80: I was back in the forest, surrounded by freshly dug damp earth.
str_1252B89F: Tears began to well up in my eyes.
str_30EE463F: What happened? How could I end up underground? I need to do something.
str_2DDDF5DC: What if I was attacked by the person who killed Miranda? Is he trying to kill me now?
str_AFAABC3B: I tried to listen to the sounds, to look into the forest, but it seemed no one was around.
str_AB94B355: The echo echoed through the branches of the trees and faded into the darkness.
str_2DF18161: I need to get out of here. The club is nearby, I need to go there and wash off this dirt.
str_CC053620: What happened? Maybe I fainted and fell into some hole. Could what I saw have been real? Or did someone attack me after all?
str_E98AFCAF: I kept looking back the whole way. I had a feeling like someone was watching me. But every time, my gaze met only the trees.
str_1ED64299: Tom was standing alone by the club doors, smoking a cigarette.
str_9FF3B0D0: Wow, what a sight. Who did you kill this time?
str_44C190A4: Leave me alone, damn it! What is even going on in this city?!
str_DC9B897B: My dignity, when I decided to talk to you again.
str_6E925B43: Well, before you arrived, everything was quite quiet and peaceful.
str_B933A4B4: Whoa, easy there. Don't lose your last friends here, girl.
str_DE3679C6: Mmm, I can't. You're just too interesting a character.
str_EBD0E644: Do you hang around here every night?
str_37856FB8: Actually, no. Some unknown force has been drawing me here for the last few days.
str_84D07413: I heard the noise of a passing car and turned towards the road.
str_676839E4: It was Edwin. He parked in the club lot and, seeing me, walked towards me.
str_23AE78C4: What are you doing? Are you okay?
str_143ED953: I turned my head, but Tom was no longer there.
str_2D6CC175: The guy, he was just here.
str_02D55412: I didn't see anyone. Better tell me what's wrong with you, why do you look like that?
str_E2B51E75: Edwin stared at my clothes and dirty shoes.
str_54039EFC: I went into the forest and then something strange happened: voices, ghosts ... and ... I don't know what it was.
str_FD5371AB: I fell. I don't know how it happened.
str_EE126E4F: Maybe it's because of the stress, you know, that can happen. You need to see a doctor.
str_A97AB601: I'm not crazy, there's something strange going on in this city.
str_44CB0B3F: Poor thing. I hope you're not hurt.
str_297C395D: I don't know, I couldn't see.
str_6F926872: That's so strange. You need to report this to the police.
str_196CD6FA: What? But why would he do that?
str_F1D2C270: I think he wishes me harm.
str_E91FB13F: I have a dress from one of the club's dancers lying around in my car. You can wear it.
str_D8452E88: After I changed and washed up, I decided to go to the bar.
str_0B813846: Edwin came up to me again.
str_8201EADB: This looks strange, of course, but at least it's clean.
str_9D1A0BCE: Edwin was anxiously scanning the crowd. It seemed like Mark was arguing with some girl at the end of the hall.
str_D6327A79: Probably not... I don't think you'd want to know about it.
str_061C62E7: Yes, you're right, I probably don't want to.
str_0A283E9A: I would like to know. Tell me what's going on.
str_24CC69E9: Sorry, I need to step away for a moment.
str_54D6BFFB: While I was alone, I decided to ask people in the club about last night.
str_868BC13D: Strangely, no one remembered us, not even the bartender.
str_AFD10083: Turning around, I saw Mark standing next to me.
str_5C86DA2E: Do you want to talk about it?
str_93BC0917: I don't think so. Looks like you've had a rough time today too.
str_5A4DAE3B: I wanted to ask you, maybe you remember something about last night?
str_D9C2CAD7: Nothing special, except that you argued and left alone.
str_004DCF86: What can even be considered strange in this chaos?
str_01FFFB7E: And what did you do after we left?
str_7C2759FE: Are you suspecting us of something?
str_DED652BE: I'm just wondering how such handsome young guys decided to spend the rest of the night if the girls left them.
str_E12712BE: I just want to know more. It's important to me, you understand?
str_61E02C69: Hmm, interesting. What if I don't remember? What if I miraculously lost all my memories of that night? Or is that role already taken by you?
str_F1DFBC57: You're acting like you're hiding something.
str_49CF0AAE: Just talk to me, am I asking for too much?
str_54ABE308: You don't have a good enough relationship with Mark.
str_27029754: I didn't mean to hurt you, I just need to understand what's going on.
str_C7C9D8CB: It's better to end this conversation.
str_E1F9201D: I really need to know what happened. I want to find the real killer.
str_34909B20: You have a good relationship with Mark.
str_16BAF376: Edwin and I went home together after the club.
str_EFCC5AC8: We met up again in the morning, and that's when we decided to go check on you.
str_C5D59583: And what time did you get to the beach?
str_81DCBA6A: Mmm... I don't remember, sometime around 9-10 in the morning.
str_9ADA270F: And there was no one there?
str_73FE1B95: Not really. I don't know, someone was wandering in the distance, probably a man. But I didn't see his face.
str_05F402BD: Did I even help you with anything?
str_FEBF0CDD: I don't know yet, but it might still be useful to me.
str_E840E07E: Yes, sorry. Something came over me today. My nerves are fraying from all of this.
str_03C7A1FD: Maybe it's just a misunderstanding. Mark is arguing with his ex-girlfriend.
str_0040E48F: That's the strangest part. She said he was cruel to her. But I don't know if she can be believed.
str_FDD83BCA: The thing is, she blamed not only him for various things. But also other guys who spent time with her.
str_CD9172EF: And what did she accuse Mark of?
str_360C4D1F: She suddenly decided to recall that he tried to strangle her. But Mark told me it was a shared fetish of theirs.
str_81DC19B1: I flashed back to how the officer described Miranda's body: 'Signs of strangulation'.
str_14B96547: I involuntarily touched my hand to my neck and remembered how Mark's thin fingers had wrapped around it.
str_B2D720EA: I involuntarily touched my hand to my neck and remembered how Mark's thin fingers had wrapped around it. I hope those weren't the same fingers that strangled Miranda!
str_5A1D9F18: Left alone, I stood by the bar for a while longer and listened to the music.
str_A4DA09D8: Through the neon lights and the crowd of people, Edwin made his way back to me.
str_1D061436: Mark came up to me again.
str_96706E3A: Yes, if it's not too much trouble.
str_34AE8657: Edwin, smiling gently, took my hand and led me to the car.
str_18CBD3ED: When we arrived at the apartment, he walked me to the door and kissed me on the cheek, wishing me good night.
str_6743C037: We walked slowly along the road towards the house.
str_1F9522A5: We continued walking through the forest straight to the house.
str_740232FE: Demons fought in my head, tugging my judgment from side to side. On one hand, I felt distrust towards Mark after the club and wanted to finally understand who he was.
str_A0C5883E: On the other hand, I was held back by the fear of ruining the connection with a person who didn't abandon me in a foreign city.
str_A0DC6509: Should I talk to Mark about the incident at the club?
str_79E93D52: I wanted to talk to you about that girl at the club.
str_4C0BE8AA: The one you were arguing with. What happened?
str_A625819C: Don't worry about that, we broke up a long time ago.
str_D095E614: That's not what worries me, but what you were arguing about.
str_7E985807: Eavesdropping on other people's conversations isn't the best idea.
str_FD8BE6FA: Really? How interesting that my friend is spreading rumors about me.
str_3B86A38D: Different games, something unusual, new. New feelings, you know what I mean?
str_C0AE99F9: Mark grabbed me by the waist and pressed me against a tree.
str_C5A798DF: His right hand touched my stomach and began to slowly slide upwards, along my chest.
str_AF610D1F: And then, cold fingers closed around my neck.
str_F03450EC: He lightly touched his lips to mine, giving a gentle kiss.
str_3CDB199C: Hmm. Okay, let's talk about this later.
str_56DE31D8: We silently entered the apartment and went to our respective rooms.
str_EB637AF8: Some kind of ancient, pulling feeling arose inside me. As if something was wrong.
str_2F78F269: The music in the club, like jackhammers, pounded right into my temples.
str_1F77709A: I think I've had enough adventures for today. Time to go home.
str_59BE2CBC: I left the club and walked along the path leading to the apartment.
str_597F485F: Thoughts buzzed in my head. What happened in the forest completely knocked me off balance.
str_2D87F020: The only thing I needed right now was sleep.
str_29440692: I entered the apartment and, before I could close the door, I heard someone's voice.
str_07923BA5: Turning around, I saw that same old man from the beach.
str_D54EEEB6: This is my apartment, sweetheart. And I didn't know you were my new tenant.
str_81B7244E: The old man said, grinning slyly.
str_3E7573C1: If I had known you were the landlord, I would never have moved in here.
str_DBF0E3EF: I don't think you had a choice, dear. It's the tourist season, everything's been booked for a while.
str_A212D557: Don't worry, I won't disturb you.
str_2843D1E5: Having said that, he approached me, still grinning slyly and baring his yellow teeth.
str_B8EE83E9: Scream at the old man to get out
str_93964D3A: Please leave. It's late and you're scaring me.
str_A009E361: Get out of here. I paid for this apartment and have the right to be here alone.
str_B023AAD3: How terrible. How can I stay here now? But I have nowhere else to go.
str_CD1C80EE: The old man went out the door, and I immediately slammed it shut and locked all the locks.
str_20FE1111: I checked the latch on the door again.
str_8B2F5829: He might have a key to the locks, but I need to be safe.
str_33D62C4E: I moved a chair against the front door.
str_7C6BA8F8: This will make me feel calmer.
str_429B05AF: How can you live your life so carefree and then plunge into real hell within a couple of days?
str_300CB19A: I'm afraid to imagine what awaits me tomorrow.
str_DAB877D9: My eyes began to close, and I drifted into my dreams.
